properties.Test Case: Test the page slider in Bloom Reader with both dragging the slider as well a clicking to a specific spot.
properties.Steps: Test the page slider in Bloom Reader with both dragging the slider as well a clicking to a specific spot.

properties.Test Case: When making a bloompub, strip out files not on a white list
properties.Steps: When making a bloompub, strip out files not on a white list

properties.Test Case: In a Collection with L1 different from L2, make a new basic book (or derivative), and put some L2 content in Inside Front Cover, Inside Back Cover, and Outside Back Cover. Ensure that for at least one of them, the L2 text is the only thing on the page (no images). Publish to BloomPUB, preview. Whether or not user has selected L2 in the language settings, the preview should contain all cover pages and their text.
properties.Steps: In a Collection with L1 different from L2, make a new basic book (or derivative), and put some L2 content in Inside Front Cover, Inside Back Cover, and Outside Back Cover. Ensure that for at least one of them, the L2 text is the only thing on the page (no images). Publish to BloomPUB, preview. Whether or not user has selected L2 in the language settings, the preview should contain all cover pages and their text.

properties.Test Case: Repeat above test with a Digital Comic Book, this time filling in End Extra 1, 2 & 3.
properties.Steps: Repeat above test with a Digital Comic Book, this time filling in End Extra 1, 2 & 3.

properties.Test Case: Install an older version and ensure you get an update notice of a new version. Update. Test opening a variety of BloomPUBs downloaded from Blorg. Ensure the correct font is used. See BL-15789.
properties.Steps: Install an older version and ensure you get an update notice of a new version. Update. Test opening a variety of BloomPUBs downloaded from Blorg. Ensure the correct font is used. See BL-15789.
